essentials.title: Passing
essentials.summary: Pass the ball with care so your teammate can play next.

essentials.title: Receiving
essentials.summary: Take your first touch into space so you stay calm on the ball.

essentials.title: Dribbling
essentials.summary: Keep the ball close when you move so you can change direction quickly.

essentials.title: Turning and shielding
essentials.summary: Use your body and small turns to keep the ball safe and escape pressure.

videos.title: How to Do the Zidane Roulette
videos.description: A spin move to turn away from pressure.

videos.title: Double Turn for Kids
videos.description: A simple turn to help you protect the ball.

essentials.title: Running with the ball
essentials.summary: Push the ball into space and run with balance when the path opens up.

essentials.title: Shooting
essentials.summary: Look up, strike through the ball, and try to hit the target.

essentials.title: Tackling and winning the ball
essentials.summary: Stay balanced, time your challenge, and try to win the ball cleanly.

essentials.title: Movement and awareness
essentials.summary: Look around, find space, and help your team with smart movement.

practiceAreas.title: Defend
practiceAreas.summary: Help your team stay safe by getting back, staying alert, and making it hard to score.

simpleRules.title: Get behind the ball
simpleRules.description: Run back so you are between the ball and your goal.

simpleRules.title: Look over your shoulder
simpleRules.description: Keep checking around you so you can spot danger early.

simpleRules.title: Slow them down
simpleRules.description: Stay balanced and delay the attacker until help arrives.

practiceAreas.title: Keep the Ball
practiceAreas.summary: Help your team stay in control with calm touches and safe passes.

simpleRules.title: Play the way you face
simpleRules.description: Use the side you can already see when pressure is close.

simpleRules.title: Take the ball, pass the ball
simpleRules.description: Control it and move it on quickly when the simple pass is there.

simpleRules.title: Use the safe pass
simpleRules.description: If the risky pass is not on, keep it simple and keep the ball.

simpleRules.title: Say "man-on"
simpleRules.description: Help your teammate with a loud warning when pressure is coming.

practiceAreas.title: Attack the Goal
practiceAreas.summary: Be brave near goal and keep moving to dangerous spaces.

simpleRules.title: Go to the golden goal area
simpleRules.description: Make runs into the best scoring spots in front of goal.

simpleRules.title: Follow in
simpleRules.description: Keep running after a shot so you are ready for rebounds.

practiceAreas.title: Support Play Off the Ball
practiceAreas.summary: Move for your teammates so the game feels easier when you do not have the ball.

simpleRules.title: Find space
simpleRules.description: Move away from defenders and into gaps where you can help.

simpleRules.title: Stay wide
simpleRules.description: Use the width of the pitch to stretch the defenders.

generalVideos.title: Basic Football Skills
generalVideos.description: A friendly skills video that covers lots of football basics.
